mapper.sql: id, name, creator_id, creator_name, department_id, department_name, total_score, duration, single_count, multi_count, judge_count, fill_count, essay_count, single_score, multi_score, judge_score, fill_score, essay_score, description, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from paper order by create_time desc
select from paper where creator_id = #{creatorId} order by create_time desc
select from paper where department_id = #{departmentId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into paper(name, creator_id, creator_name, department_id, department_name, total_score, duration, single_count, multi_count, judge_count, fill_count, essay_count, single_score, multi_score, judge_score, fill_score, essay_score, description, status) values(#{name}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName}, #{departmentId}, #{departmentName}, #{totalScore}, #{duration}, #{singleCount}, #{multiCount}, #{judgeCount}, #{fillCount}, #{essayCount}, #{singleScore}, #{multiScore}, #{judgeScore}, #{fillScore}, #{essayScore}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from paper where id in
#{id}
